{{Quote|As STAR Comics kept going, I wrote the rest of the MADBALLS run as well as other titles like HEATHCLIFF and CARE BEARS while Dave did great work on STAR WARS DROIDS and BULLWINKLE & ROCKY.|Michael Gallagher|<ref name="About Me">{{WebCite|url=https://www.davemanak.com/about|text=About Me|work=Davemanak.com|author=Michael Gallagher|archivedate=20250114182950}}</ref>}}
'''David (Dave) Manak''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] writer and artist.

He wrote every issue of the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel Comics]]/[[Star Comics]] [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] comic book series, and all but one issue of the [[Star Wars: Droids (1986)|''Droids'']] series. In his almost three decades at Marvel, Manak worked on a number of comic books, such as the [[Wikipedia:Rocky and Bullwinkle Show|''Rocky and Bullwinkle'']], [[Wikipedia:Sonic the Hedgehog (Archie)|''Sonic the Hedgehog Comic Books'']] and [[Wikipedia:Weird War|''Weird War'']] series.

Manak also worked on the editorial staff at [[Wikipedia:DC Comics|DC]] from [[1981]] to [[1983]], where he edited such titles as ''[[Wikipedia:Green Lantern (comic book)|Green Lantern]]''.<ref name="DC in the 80s">{{WebCite|url=https://www.dcinthe80s.com/2021/01/dc-in-80s-interviews-editor-dave-manak.html|text=DC in the 80s interviews editor Dave Manak|work=DC in the 80s|author=Justin|date=2021-01-27|archivedate=20250116091954}}</ref>
